implemented: Path-aware TS/JS grammar selection in ParserPool. New TsDialect enum (Ts/Tsx/None) and ParserKey cache key replace the single-TldrLanguage key. New select_ts_grammar() picks LANGUAGE_TSX for .tsx/.jsx, LANGUAGE_TYPESCRIPT otherwise. New parse_with_path(source, lang, Option<&Path>) routes through dialect-aware selection; parse_file now threads the path into parse_with_path. Legacy parse(source, lang) preserved as path-less default (returns non-TSX for TS/JS). Tier-1 smell detectors got _with_path variants (detect_deep_nesting_with_path, detect_data_classes_with_path, detect_lazy_elements_with_path, detect_message_chains_with_path, detect_primitive_obsession_with_path); collect_tier1_ast_smells forwards the file path so JSX files get the correct grammar and the message-chain detector stays linear. Files changed: crates/tldr-core/src/ast/parser.rs (+349, -10 LOC) and crates/tldr-core/src/quality/smells.rs (+183, -30 LOC). Option (a) from the plan was feasible; option (b) was not needed — no cascading test breakage.

discoveries.finding: tree-sitter-typescript does not ship a separate JSX grammar — LANGUAGE_TSX handles both TSX and JSX. Routing .jsx files through TSX is the correct (and only) fix.

callgraph subsystem (callgraph/languages/mod.rs:543, callgraph/types.rs:644) was already doing its own dialect selection — those call sites are untouched and continue to work. Only the smells/Tier-1 detector pipeline was broken.
Pre-fix ERROR-node count on the synthetic 500-line SVG-in-JSX fixture was 1010 via LANGUAGE_TYPESCRIPT; post-fix is 0 via LANGUAGE_TSX. That's a direct measure of the grammar mismatch's severity.

The pathological traversal in find_message_chains (smells.rs:1436-1486) was fed by the ERROR-laden AST but also needed a visited_lines set to terminate — under the wrong grammar, near-duplicate chain candidates multiplied and even with the visited set the recursion ballooned. Fixing the grammar is the root cause; the detector itself is sound on well-formed trees.

issues.issue: Pre-existing tldr-cli test failure: commands::bugbot::text_format::tests::test_text_format_generic_evidence_shows_numbers. Unrelated to VAL-004 — file was already modified in the working tree by prior work (diff: 2394 -> 2399 LOC) before this session. Not caused by this milestone.

conventions.convention: Path-aware parsing: callers that know a file path should use ParserPool::parse_file or parse_with_path. Callers without a path can keep using the legacy parse(source, lang), which documents a conservative default for TS/JS (no TSX).

Tier-1 smell detector pattern: each public detector has a path-less form (legacy API) and a _with_path variant accepting Option<&Path>. Internal orchestration (collect_tier1_ast_smells) uses the _with_path variants to forward the file path through the parse stack.
